summary: Plan-mode classification only. #86493 remains the best live canonical issue for the StepFun image_generation provider registration gap. #86605 is an open related candidate PR that targets the same root cause, but merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout is not recommendable in this job because merge/fix actions are blocked, mergeability is unknown, real behavior proof is skipped, and ClawSweeper review did not complete.
